data.title: Historic Battleground Country Club, 40th club in Concert Golf portfolio, at site of Revolutionary War battle.
data.description: A prestigious property in Manalapan, New Jersey, with historical significance as the location where George Washington commanded the Continental Army during the Battle of Monmouth in 1778, has become the newest addition to Concert Golf's collection of clubs. Battleground Country Club, set on 220 acres, has become the 40th club in their portfolio.

data.title: Teamsters at Avis Rental Car, represented by Local 528, to rally at Hartsfield-Jackson Atlanta Airport for fair contract on Jan. 19.
data.description: Teamsters Local 528, along with elected officials and members of the community in Atlanta, are calling for a fair contract for Avis Rental Car workers. The rally is scheduled for Monday, January 19 at the Hartsfield-Jackson Atlanta International Airport. The workers are seeking fair working conditions and compensation as outlined in the upcoming negotiations. The event aims to highlight the importance of supporting workers' rights. A significant turnout is expected at the rally to show solidarity and advocate for a just agreement.

data.title: Efforts underway to curb A.I.'s impact on rising energy costs as demand surge drives up bills.
data.description: The surge in demand from data centers powering artificial intelligence technologies has led to a significant increase in electricity bills, causing frustration among consumers.

data.title: Law firm KSF investigates Inspirato Inc.'s sale to Exclusive Investments LLC (NasdaqGM: ISPO) on Jan. 16, 2026.
data.description: Investigator Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., along with law firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, is looking into the potential acquisition of Inspirato Incorporated (NasdaqGM: ISPO) by Exclusive Investments LLC. The investigation concerns the terms of the sale and its impact on shareholders.

data.title: Kahn Swick & Foti investigates sale of Confluent, Inc. (NASDAQ: CFLT) to IBM. Attorney General and law firm involved.
data.description: A recent press release from New York and New Orleans on January 16, 2026 did not disclose the source but reported on the investigation led by former Louisiana Attorney General Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq. and the law firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC. This investigation concerns the potential acquisition of Confluent, Inc. (NasdaqGS: CFLT) by International Business Machines Corporation.
AMERICAN ASSETS SHARES EXTEND DROP TO AS MUCH AS 1.9%

data.title: Denny’s acquired by TriArtisan Capital Advisors, Treville Capital Group, Yadav Enterprises.Occurred after stockholder & regulatory approval.
data.description: In Spartanburg, S.C. on January 16, 2026, Denny’s Corporation, a company listed on NASDAQ as DENN and the owner of Denny’s Inc. and Keke’s Inc., confirmed the finalization of its acquisition by TriArtisan Capital Advisors LLC, Treville Capital Group, and Yadav Enterprises, Inc. This announcement came after receiving approval from Denny’s stockholders and meeting all necessary regulatory and standard closing requirements.

data.title: Donny Fineberg leads capital markets strategy at BrightSky Residential, focusing on institutional and private investors.
data.description: Donny Fineberg has been appointed by BrightSky Residential, a prominent Build-To-Rent developer based in Irvine, California, to oversee connections with institutional and private investors.

data.title: LogicMonitor CEO Christina Kosmowski will speak at Davos on scaling AI, addressing trust and resilience in a series of high-profile panels at the 2026 World Economic Forum.
data.description: In Santa Barbara, California, LogicMonitor, the leading AI-first hybrid observability platform for digital infrastructure, revealed that CEO Christina Kosmowski is set to take part in various prestigious panels and discussions at the 2026 World Economic Forum Annual Meeting in Davos. Throughout the event, Kosmowski will collaborate with top global figures to address the challenges of implementing AI on a large scale, focusing on themes such as trust, resilience, and the essential components for successful AI integration.

data.title: Investigation by Kahn Swick & Foti law firm into sale of Calavo Growers, Inc. to Mission Produce, Inc. (NasdaqGS: CVGW to AVO).
data.description: A recent announcement on Jan. 16, 2026, stated that Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., former Attorney General of Louisiana, along with law firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF), is currently conducting an investigation into the planned acquisition of Calavo Growers, Inc. (NasdaqGS: CVGW) by Mission Produce, Inc. (NasdaqGS: AVO). This move signifies a significant development in the business world, as these two entities are key players in the industry. The investigation seeks to delve deeper into the terms of the sale, aiming to ensure transparency and legality throughout the process. This news highlights the importance of thorough examination and due diligence in major financial transactions.

data.title: Investigation launched into Penumbra, Inc. sale to Boston Scientific Corp. by Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, Former Louisiana AG involved.
data.description: A recent press release announced that Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., the former Attorney General of Louisiana, along with the law firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF), is currently conducting an investigation into the planned acquisition of Penumbra, Inc. (NYSE: PEN) by Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX). The investigation focuses on key aspects of the proposed sale, seeking to provide crucial insights and analysis for stakeholders involved in this transaction.

data.title: LS Cable & System invests $156M in Mexico to boost production capacity, transform LSCMX as key manufacturing hub.
data.description: In Querétaro, Mexico, LS Cable & System Ltd. disclosed a strategic investment of around $156 million in its manufacturing subsidiary, LS Cable & System, S.A. de C.V. The investment aims to boost production capacity and enhance the company's integrated manufacturing and supply chain network in North America. This significant investment will lead to the transformation of LSCMX.

data.title: Eason Technology Limited receives warning letter from NYSE American for non-compliance with Section 401(a) of NYSE rules.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, Eason Technology Limited disclosed receiving a warning letter from NYSE American LLC due to non-compliance with Section 401(a) of the NYSE. The company, listed as DXF on NYSE American, is facing issues related to this violation.

data.title: Investigation underway regarding sale of Exact Sciences Corporation to Abbott Laboratories - EXAS to ABT.
data.description: An inquiry is being conducted by Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., former Attorney General of Louisiana, and law firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, regarding the potential acquisition of Exact Sciences Corporation (NasdaqCM: EXAS) by Abbott Laboratories (NYSE: ABT). The investigation pertains to the sale proposal between the two companies.

data.title: Scholarship offering $1,500 for undergrad students committed to healthcare innovation by Dr. Sajad Zalzala.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, in Detroit, the Dr. Sajad Zalzala Scholarship for Healthcare Professionals unveiled a new $1,500 scholarship aimed at aiding undergraduate students dedicated to revolutionizing healthcare through preventive medicine and addressing core issues. The scholarship seeks to empower students pursuing careers in healthcare with a focus on preventative measures and long-term solutions.

data.title: Thomas Mollick launches $1,000 scholarship for undergraduate entrepreneurs nationwide to foster innovation and leadership.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on January 16, 2026, the Thomas Mollick Scholarship for Entrepreneurs has launched its first award cycle. This scholarship is open to undergraduate students across the country and offers a $1,000 grant aimed at promoting innovation, leadership, and entrepreneurial skills. The scholarship was created by Thomas Mollick.
